# @univerjs-pro/edit-history-loader

[![npm version](https://img.shields.io/npm/v/@univerjs-pro/edit-history-loader?style=flat-square)](https://npmjs.com/package/@univerjs-pro/edit-history-loader)
[![downloads](https://img.shields.io/npm/dm/@univerjs-pro/edit-history-loader?style=flat-square)](https://npmjs.com/package/@univerjs-pro/edit-history-loader)

`@univerjs-pro/edit-history-loader` provides edit history loading integration for Univer Pro.

## Package Overview

| Package | UMD global | CSS | Locales | Facade entry |
| --- | --- | :---: | :---: | :---: |
| `@univerjs-pro/edit-history-loader` | `UniverProEditHistoryLoader` | No | No | No |

## Installation

```sh
pnpm add @univerjs-pro/edit-history-loader
# or
npm install @univerjs-pro/edit-history-loader
```

Keep all `@univerjs/*` and `@univerjs-pro/*` packages on the same version.

## Usage

```ts
import { UniverEditHistoryLoaderPlugin } from '@univerjs-pro/edit-history-loader';

univer.registerPlugin(UniverEditHistoryLoaderPlugin);
```

Exported plugin classes:

- `UniverEditHistoryLoaderPlugin`
- `UniverEditHistoryLoaderMobilePlugin`

## Integration Notes

This package composes collaboration, edit history, and feature packages to load historical workbook states.
